$schema: Manifest contract for zernio-publish — author your post once, ship to N platforms.
_slug_help: Filename-safe identifier for ./posts/ logging. Date-prefix is conventional but optional.
content: The default caption/description shared across platforms. Platforms can override via customContent in the per-platform entry. Keep this under the strictest platform's limit you're targeting (Twitter 280 if you publish to Twitter without customContent).
_content_help: Top-level content = caption / description / post body across every platform.

media._help: video is optional (text-only posts skip it). thumbnail required for YouTube + Pinterest + Facebook video. Must be JPEG.

_scheduledFor_help: ISO 8601 datetime, or 'auto' for now+3min. NEVER use publishNow:true for multi-platform — causes timeouts and duplicates.

youtube.title: Video title (under 100 chars)
youtube.firstComment: Engagement question + your CTA — MUST be in the create call.

twitter.customContent: Twitter-specific text (280 chars or 4000 with Blue). Overrides top-level content for this platform only.

reddit.title: Reddit post title (300 chars max, this IS the hook)

_platforms_help: Include ONLY the platforms you want to publish to. Each platform's required fields are documented in reference/platforms/{platform}.md. Fields with `customContent` override the top-level content for that platform only.
